features.featureTitle: Update the 'Add Bill' form to include an editable line item table with up to 10 rows. Each row must have fields for Sr. No. (auto-incremented), HSN Code (text input), Product Name (text input), and Item Amount (numeric input). GST per item (18% of item amount) must be computed and displayed automatically per row. The form must allow adding rows (up to 10) and removing rows. The overall bill GST breakdown (CGST 9%, SGST 9%, round-off, final amount) must be derived from the aggregated item totals and displayed in a live summary below the table before saving. Remove the single 'Base Amount' field and replace it with the aggregated total from the line items.

Update the invoice print view (InvoicePrintView) to include the line item table. The printed invoice must display a table with columns: Sr. No., HSN Code, Product Name, Amount (₹), GST (₹) for all items on the bill. Below the item table, continue to show the existing GST summary (Base Amount, CGST 9%, SGST 9%, Round-off, Final Amount).
